info.title: Dyalog Content Management System
info.description: REST API for the Dyalog Content Management System. All collection GET endpoints are paginated and return a consistent envelope (`data`, `meta`, `links`). Write operations require Bearer token authentication.

tags.name: Presentations
tags.description: Presentation resources and their associated presenters and media.

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Administrative operations. All require bearer token authentication.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing bearer token.

NotFound.description: Not found — the requested resource does not exist.

NoContent.description: No content — the resource was deleted successfully.

total.description: Total count of results for this query

from.description: Ordinal of the first result on this page

to.description: Ordinal of the last result on this page

VideoSummary.description: Abbreviated video object returned by the recommendations sub-resource.

physical.description: 1 if this is a physical/in-person event

digital.description: 1 if this is a digital/online event

early_bird.description: End of early-bird registration, YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss

code.description: Alphanumeric code, unique within the event

PresenterLink.description: Represents a person's role as a presenter on a specific presentation.

affiliation_id.description: Organisation the presenter was affiliated with at the time of presentation

MediaItem.description: A media item linked to a presentation.

200.description: A string containing the current version number.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across titles, descriptions, presenter names, and event names. Terms separated by space, comma, or plus.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order. Defaults to `relevance` when `search` is supplied, otherwise `newest`.

parameters.name: presenter_id
parameters.description: Filter to videos presented by this person ID.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: Filter to videos belonging to this event ID.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Filter to videos presented on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Filter to videos presented on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

200.description: A paginated list of video objects.

400.description: Bad request — youtube_id is not 11 characters.

get.summary: Get recommended videos similar to a given video.
get.description: Uses cosine similarity computed over video metadata. Recommendations are pre-computed and rebuilt by `POST /v1/admin/cache/refresh`.

200.description: A list of recommended video summaries.

parameters.name: is_presenter
parameters.description: When `true`, return only persons who appear as a presenter on at least one presentation.

200.description: A paginated list of person objects.

get.summary: List videos presented by a person.

200.description: A paginated list of video objects for this presenter.
A paginated list of organisation objects.

parameters.name: has_videos
parameters.description: When `true`, return only events that have at least one associated video.

200.description: A paginated list of event objects.
A paginated list of presentation objects for this event.
A paginated list of video objects for this event.
A paginated list of event type objects.
A paginated list of presentation objects.

post.description: Creates a presentation record only. Add presenters via `POST /v1/presentations/{id}/presenters` and media via `POST /v1/presentations/{id}/media`.

200.description: A list of presenter link objects for this presentation.

post.summary: Add a presenter to a presentation.

delete.summary: Remove a presenter from a presentation.

get.summary: List media items on a presentation.

200.description: A list of media item objects for this presentation.

post.summary: Add a media item to a presentation.

text.description: Link display text, used when type=general

422.description: Unprocessable entity — required field for the given `type` is missing.

delete.summary: Remove a media item from a presentation.

200.description: A paginated list of presentation type objects.
A paginated list of category objects.

post.summary: Rebuild the search cache and recommendation index.
post.description: Fetches fresh data from YouTube, re-indexes all video metadata for full-text search, and recomputes the cosine-similarity recommendation matrix. This is an expensive operation; it runs asynchronously and its effects are visible on the next request after it completes.

post.summary: Sync Team Dyalog member videos to WordPress.
post.description: Fetches up to `n` latest videos per Team Dyalog member from DCMS and pushes them to the WordPress site as custom posts via the WordPress REST API.

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: Maximum number of latest videos to sync per person (default: 10).
